modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Printer not printing due to low memory error.

full_description_text:  
The user is experiencing an issue where the printer fails to print documents. An error message indicates that memory is low, resulting in the cancellation of the print job. This problem occurs in both Windows 7 and Windows 10 environments.
short_description: Printer not printing due to low memory error.
description: The user is experiencing an issue where the printer fails to print documents. An error message indicates that memory is low, resulting in the cancellation of the print job. This problem occurs in both Windows 7 and Windows 10 environments.
